phrases.intent_en: Ask which palaces on Via Garibaldi are open to visit
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quali palazzi di Via Garibaldi si possono visitare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-lee pah-LAHT-tsee dee VEE-ah gah-ree-BAL-dee see pos-SOH-noh vee-zee-TAH-reh?
phrases.cultural_note: Via Garibaldi (the Strada Nuova) is a UNESCO World Heritage street of Renaissance palaces; Palazzo Rosso, Bianco and Tursi are the main museums.

responses.english: Palazzo Rosso, Bianco and Tursi, with one combined ticket.
responses.phonetic: pah-LAHT-tsoh ROS-soh, BYAN-koh eh TOOR-see, kon oon beel-YET-toh OO-nee-koh.
responses.french: Palazzo Rosso, Bianco e Tursi, con un biglietto unico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy a combined museum ticket
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra il biglietto per i Musei di Strada Nuova?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah eel beel-YET-toh per ee moo-ZEH-ee dee STRAH-dah NWOH-vah?

responses.english: At the ticket desk in Palazzo Rosso, number eleven.
responses.phonetic: AL-lah KAS-sah dee pah-LAHT-tsoh ROS-soh, al noo-MEH-roh OON-dee-chee.
responses.french: Alla cassa di Palazzo Rosso, al numero undici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the Via Garibaldi walking route takes
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto tempo ci vuole per percorrere Via Garibaldi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh TEM-poh chee VWOH-leh per per-kor-REH-reh VEE-ah gah-ree-BAL-dee?

responses.english: The street itself is short — with the museums, half a day.
responses.phonetic: lah VEE-ah een seh eh BREH-veh — kon ee moo-ZEH-ee, MED-tsah jor-NAH-tah.
responses.french: La via in sé è breve — con i musei, mezza giornata.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside the palaces
phrases.text_local: Scusi, si possono fare fotografie dentro i palazzi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see pos-SOH-noh FAH-reh foh-toh-GRAH-fee-eh DEN-troh ee pah-LAHT-tsee?

responses.english: Yes, no flash in the main halls.
responses.phonetic: see, SEN-tsah flash nay sah-LOH-nee preen-chee-PAH-lee.
responses.french: Sì, senza flash nei saloni principali.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which is the most impressive palace
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, qual è il palazzo più imponente da visitare?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, kwahl eh eel pah-LAHT-tsoh PYOO eem-poh-NEN-teh dah vee-zee-TAH-reh?

responses.english: Palazzo Rosso, for the art collection and frescoes.
responses.phonetic: pah-LAHT-tsoh ROS-soh, per lah kol-leh-TSYOH-neh DAR-teh eh lyee af-FRES-kee.
responses.french: Palazzo Rosso, per la collezione d'arte e gli affreschi.
